title: senecio claryae
intro: Senecio claryae, also known as Groundsel tree, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The health benefits of Senecio claryae include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Senecio claryae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
